# Modalogue LLM Index

Modalogue is a monorepo for a headless modal engine and React bindings.

## Packages

- `@modalogue/core`: `packages/core`
- `@modalogue/react`: `packages/react`
- Demo website: `www`

## Canonical docs

- Root usage docs: `README.md`
- Contributor workflow: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Agent workflow and guardrails: `AGENTS.md`
- Core package docs: `packages/core/README.md`
- React package docs: `packages/react/README.md`
- Demo app docs: `www/README.md`

## Canonical API files

- Core implementation: `packages/core/src/index.ts`
- Core types: `packages/core/src/types.ts`

## Behavioral source of truth

- Unit tests: `packages/core/tests/unit/modal.test.ts`
- Integration tests: `tests/integration/react-integration.test.tsx`
- E2E tests: `tests/e2e/modal.spec.ts`

## Commands (repo root)

- Install: `pnpm install`
- Develop: `pnpm dev`
- Build: `pnpm build`
- Type-check: `pnpm type-check`
- Unit tests: `pnpm test:unit`
- Integration tests: `pnpm test:integration`
- E2E tests: `pnpm test`

## API semantics summary

- Instance-based API (`new Modalogue()`), not a global singleton.
- `open(content)` resets history.
- `navigate(content)` pushes a new view.
- `back()` pops history, closes at depth 1.
- `close()` clears history and hides modal.
- `hide()` toggles visibility only, preserving history.
